paper.title: Futari tabi: Shannhai kara Pari e – Kaneko Mitsuharu・Mori Michiyo no kaigai taiken to ikyō bungaku二人旅 上海からパリへ 金子光晴・森三千代の海外体験と異郷文学 (Couple’s Traveling from Shanghai to Paris: Overseas Experience and Diaspora Literature of Kaneko Mitsuharu and Mori Michiyo)
